translations.en: a charismatic man with an engaging smile.
translations.zh: 魅力十足之男子，笑容令人心悅。

translations.en: "Welcome back, stranger." He winks at you.
translations.zh: 「又回來了，陌生人。」他向你眨眨眼。

translations.en: "Welcome." He makes a sweeping gesture with his hat.
translations.zh: 「歡迎光臨。」他以帽子做了個大幅的招手。

translations.en: "Shawn, friend."
"Which: @ham, @ale, @mead, @wine, or @rations?"
translations.zh: 「請問要哪樣：@火腿、@麥酒、@蜜酒、@葡萄酒，還是@口糧？」

translations.en: "I sell @ham, @ale, @mead, @wine, and @rations."
translations.zh: 「我賣@火腿、@麥酒、@蜜酒、@葡萄酒及@口糧。」

translations.en: "That's it."
"I'm glad you stopped by." He gives you a firm handshake.
translations.zh: 「很高興你來了。」他與你握了握手。

translations.en: "I'm sorry. Perhaps you could ask someone else."
"Which of you?"
"Very well..."
$N smiles at $Y and says, "That will cost you #1 gold. Interested?"
translations.zh: $N對$Y微笑道：「這要#1枚金幣。有意嗎？」

translations.en: "You can't carry it, $Y."
"Fine!" After accepting $Y's gold, $N hands over the purchase.
translations.zh: 「好！」$N收下$Y的金幣，將購物遞了過去。

translations.en: "You don't have enough gold, $Y."
"It'll cost you 5 gold for the ham. Interested?"
"You can't carry it, $Y."
"Excellent!" After accepting the gold, $N serves $Y the ham.
translations.zh: 「好極了！」$N收下金幣，為$Y上了火腿。

translations.en: "How were you looking to pay for the meal? Eh?"
$N looks at $Y and says, "It'll cost you 4 gold for each ration. How many do you want?"
translations.zh: $N看著$Y道：「每份口糧4枚金幣。你要幾份？」

translations.en: "Come now, that's a little much, don't you think?"
$N frowns at $Y and says, "That was a good price."
translations.zh: $N對$Y皺眉道：「那已經是優惠價了。」

translations.en: "You haven't any room in your pack, $Y."
"Mutton rations cost more gold than you have, $Y."
translations.zh: 「羊肉口糧的價格超過你的金幣，$Y。」

translations.en: He hands $Y #2 mutton ration\s.
"There ya go."
"That's all you can carry."
"That's all you can afford."

translator_notes: Shawn 是酒館/食品商人，口吻熱絡。商品詞保留 @ 前綴以供 keyword 比對。
